column4: Validate registration with empty email/phone field
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Register Page
3.leave email & phone fields empty
4.Click on the continue button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "Email or phone number is required"
column7: System displayed error message for empty fields

column4: Validate registration with existing email field
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Register Page
3.Enter an existing email address into the email field
4.Click on the continue button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "Email is already registered"

column4: Validate email field with invalid email (without '@')
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Register Page
3.Enter an email address without '@' symbol (e.g., abcgmail.com)
4.Click on the continue button
column6: System should display an error message indicating invalid email format
column7: System displayed error message for invalid email format

column4: Validate registration with  invalid mobile number
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Register Page
3.Enter the invalid mobile number into the mobile field
4.Click on the continue button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "Please enter a valid  mobile number"

column4: Validate registration with existing mobile number
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Register Page
3.Enter the existing mobile number into the mobile field
4.Click on the continue button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "Mobile number is already registered"

column4: Validate registration with empty OTP field
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Register Page
3.Enter the valid number into the mobile number field
4.Navigate to the OTP page
5.Leave OTP field empty
6.Click on Signup button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "Please enter OTP"

column4: Validate registration with invalid OTP  field
column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Register Page
3.Enter the valid number into the mobile number field
4.Navigate to the OTP page
5.Enter the invalid OTP into the OTP field
6.Click on Signup button
column6: Error message should be displayed for "Invalid OTP, please try again"

column5:
1.Open the Flipkart application
2.Navigate to the Register Page
3.Enter the valid number into the mobile number field
4.Navigate to the OTP page
5.Enter the valid OTP into the OTP field 
6.Click on Signup button
column7: User registration completed and redirected to home page
